changes.reason: Batch G state-specific fallback test. breakout_long_no_0dte is positive overall because of one EXPIRED_0DTE winner, but the STALE_0DTE slice is low efficiency: 2 trades, $71 PnL, 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE. Reducing the adaptive cap from 6 to the grid value 4 tests faster realization in stale/no-0DTE breakout fallback without touching VALID_0DTE option-confirmed profiles.

Keep the stale fallback from waiting for a 6-point target when no valid 0DTE map is available. A 4-point fixed target is still above the current pullback fallback target but should reduce exposure drag from stale breakout attempts.

Current stale breakout fallback has high RSI/ADX but poor exposure efficiency. Raising ES VWAP slope from 0.08 to 0.10 uses the Batch G grid to require stronger ES-only continuation when the 0DTE map is stale or expired, without changing VALID_0DTE routing.

expected_effect: Should improve stale/no-0DTE fallback PnL per exposure hour and reduce hidden MAE/hold-time drag while leaving the 78 VALID_0DTE trades untouched. Tradeoff is possible loss of the single EXPIRED_0DTE convex winner or fewer fallback trades; reject if total net profit drops below 98% of run_044, fallback expectancy turns negative, or VALID_0DTE attribution changes materially.
label: no-0dte-breakout-realization-tighten
rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_g_missing_0dte_policy_adapted. The leader base is already strong, so the next experiment should avoid broad veto tightening and avoid disturbing the core VALID_0DTE engines. The cleanest remaining inefficiency is data-state-specific: STALE_0DTE fallback is positive but weak and slow, while VALID_0DTE and VALID_1DTE_ONLY carry the system. This tests whether the no-0DTE breakout fallback should be more momentum-confirmed and faster to realize when option confirmation is unavailable.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: STALE_0DTE fallback produced 5 trades and $162.8 total, but breakout_long_no_0dte contributed only $71 over 2 trades with 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE. EXPIRED_0DTE had one strong trade, so this must be measured by state rather than promoted from aggregate PnL alone.
strategy_hypotheses.name: No-0DTE Breakout Realization Box
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small sample risk is high; tighter slope and smaller targets can remove or underpay the single EXPIRED_0DTE winner, causing profit suppression without improving portfolio risk-adjusted score.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: STALE_0DTE or EXPIRED_0DTE routed breakout_long_no_0dte entries where no valid 0DTE option map is available and the trade must rely on ES continuation quality.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Fallback PnL/exposure improves versus 83.2 aggregate and 40.5 breakout stale slice, fallback expectancy remains positive, VALID_0DTE PnL/trade count remains unchanged, total net profit retains at least 98% of run_044, and slow_12h remains 0.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: Short 12.3-day, high-win-rate, take-profit-only SPX500 long scalper regime. The objective is risk-adjusted, but realized losses and slow >=12h trades are absent, so the practica...

new_strategy_ideas.name: Early Progress Heat Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce worst MAE toward <= -513.4 and preferably <= -403 while retaining >=90% affected-profile PnL, >=95% protected fast winners, and total score flat or better.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Delta Charm Breakout Dormant Attribution Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Positive standalone PnL, no more than 10% degradation in squeeze/charm-wall combined PnL, total net profit >=98% of leader, worst MAE no worse than -513.4.
